message:
🐛 Use smaller font + CSS scale in tiles for readable text (#145)

Instead of pure CSS scaling from font 14 (which made text ~50% size),
tile mode now:
1. Reduces fontSize to tileFontSize (13/10/8 based on grid density)
   WITHOUT calling fitAddon.fit() — preserves cols/rows and buffer
2. Applies CSS transform: scale() for remaining size mismatch

This gives significantly larger, more readable text while still
preserving terminal content (no alternate buffer clear).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
